technology.title: Why Wall Street wasn’t won over by Nvidia’s big conference
technology.summary: Despite investor fears of an AI bubble, Nvidia's latest conference shows that most in the industry aren't concerned by that possibility.

briefing.news_focus: Despite investor fears of an AI bubble, Nvidia's latest conference shows that most in the industry aren't concerned by that possibility.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 儘管投資者對人工智慧泡沫的擔憂，Nvidia最近的會議顯示業界大多數人並不擔心這一可能性，Wall Street卻未被說服。
briefing.background: Nvidia作為人工智慧領域的領導者，近期舉辦的會議展示了其在AI技術上的最新進展。儘管市場對AI技術的潛力持樂觀態度，但投資者仍對可能出現的泡沫表示擔憂。過去幾年，AI產業的快速增長引發了對其可持續性的質疑，特別是在經濟不確定性加劇的背景下。
briefing.analysis: Nvidia的會議雖然展示了其技術的前景，但Wall Street的冷淡反應反映出投資者對市場過熱的擔憂。對於Nvidia而言，這可能意味著需要加強與投資者的溝通，增強信心。另一方面，市場分析師可能會持續關注AI技術的實際應用與收益，這將影響未來的投資決策。若泡沫擔憂持續，可能導致資金流出，影響Nvidia及其他科技公司的股價表現。

supporting_titles: AI was everywhere at gaming’s big developer conference — except the games

technology.title: US Takes Down Botnets Used in Record-Breaking Cyberattacks
technology.summary: The Aisuru, Kimwolf, JackSkid, and Mossad botnets had infected more than 3 million devices in total, many inside home networks, according to the US Justice Department.

briefing.news_focus: The Aisuru, Kimwolf, JackSkid, and Mossad botnets had infected more than 3 million devices in total, many inside home networks, according to the US Justice Department.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國司法部宣布摧毀Aisuru、Kimwolf、JackSkid及Mossad四個大型機器人網絡，這些網絡共感染超過300萬台設備，許多位於家庭網絡中，標誌著對網絡安全的重大打擊。
briefing.background: 隨著物聯網設備的普及，家庭網絡成為網絡攻擊的新目標。這些機器人網絡通常用於發動分散式拒絕服務攻擊（DDoS），對企業和個人造成重大威脅。美國政府在過去幾年中加強了對網絡犯罪的打擊，並與國際夥伴合作，以應對日益嚴重的網絡安全挑戰。
briefing.analysis: 此次行動標誌著美國在打擊網絡犯罪方面的重大進展，特別是針對家庭網絡的攻擊。與以往的行動相比，此次摧毀的機器人網絡規模更大且影響範圍更廣，顯示出美國在應對新型網絡威脅方面的能力提升。這也可能促使其他國家加強對類似威脅的防範與應對，進一步改變全球網絡安全格局。

technology.title: The Pentagon is planning for AI companies to train on classified data, defense official says
technology.summary: The Pentagon is discussing plans to set up secure environments for generative AI companies to train military-specific versions of their models on classified data, MIT Technology Review has learned. AI models like Anthropic’s Claude are already used to answer questions in classified settings; applications include analyzing targets in Iran. But allowing models to train on…

briefing.news_focus: The Pentagon is discussing plans to set up secure environments for generative AI companies to train military-specific versions of their models on classified data, MIT Technology Review has learned. AI models like Anthropic’s Claude are already used to answer questions in classified settings; applications include analyzing targets in Iran. But allowing models to train on…
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國國防部正在討論為生成式人工智慧公司設立安全環境，以便這些公司能在機密數據上訓練軍事專用版本的模型，這可能會改變軍事情報分析的方式。
briefing.background: 隨著人工智慧技術的迅速發展，軍事應用成為各國競爭的焦點。美國國防部已經開始探索如何利用AI來提升情報分析能力，特別是在面對如伊朗等國的軍事威脅時。此舉不僅涉及技術創新，還涉及國家安全與數據保護的複雜性，因為機密數據的使用需遵循嚴格的法律與倫理標準。
briefing.analysis: 國防部的計劃可能會引發不同利益方的關注與擔憂。對於AI公司而言，這是擴大商業機會的良機，但同時也需面對數據安全與倫理的挑戰。國防部希望透過這些技術提升軍事效率，但也需考慮到可能的監管與公眾反對聲音。此外，這一策略可能會引發其他國家的技術競爭，進一步加劇全球軍備競賽。

supporting_titles: New court filing reveals Pentagon told Anthropic the two sides were nearly aligned — a week after Trump declared the relationship kaput

politics.title: Iran war delivers new inflation stress to African economies emerging from older shocks
politics.summary: The ripples of the war against Iran by the US and Israel are exerting inflationary pressures across Africa through higher energy and fertiliser prices, threatening an already fragile economic recovery. Most of Africa’s 54 countries depend on fuel imports and have experienced sharp increases in fuel prices, driven by disruptions to Middle East exports and the surge in global prices. Most are just getting over the price shocks caused by Russia’s war with Ukraine, which started in 2022 and has hurt...

briefing.news_focus: The ripples of the war against Iran by the US and Israel are exerting inflationary pressures across Africa through higher energy and fertiliser prices, threatening an already fragile economic recovery. Most of Africa’s 54 countries depend on fuel imports and have experienced sharp increases in fuel prices, driven by disruptions to Middle East exports and the surge in global prices. Most are just getting over the price shocks caused by Russia’s war with Ukraine, which started in 2022 and has hurt...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國與以色列對伊朗的戰爭引發非洲各國面臨新的通脹壓力，能源與肥料價格上漲威脅到脆弱的經濟復甦，尤其是在剛從俄烏戰爭的價格衝擊中恢復之際。
briefing.background: 非洲54個國家大多依賴燃料進口，近期因中東出口中斷及全球價格上漲，燃料價格急劇上升，對經濟復甦造成重大挑戰。自2022年俄烏戰爭以來，非洲國家已經面臨高通脹的困擾，這次新的衝突進一步加劇了其經濟脆弱性，影響了各國的能源安全與糧食供應。
briefing.analysis: 這場戰爭使非洲國家面臨更高的能源與肥料成本，影響農業生產與民生，可能導致社會不穩定。各國政府需在控制通脹與維持經濟增長之間尋求平衡。對於依賴進口的國家，這將加大財政壓力，可能引發抗議或政治動盪。另一方面，能源出口國如尼日利亞或安哥拉可能在短期內受益於價格上漲，但長期來看，整體經濟仍面臨挑戰。

politics.title: Deterring China: The Growing Japan–Philippines Security Partnership
politics.summary: The growing partnership between Japan and the Philippines is not an actual alliance – but it could affect the balance of power in the South China Sea.

briefing.news_focus: The growing partnership between Japan and the Philippines is not an actual alliance – but it could affect the balance of power in the South China Sea.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 日本與菲律賓之間日益增強的安全夥伴關係雖然不是正式的聯盟，但可能會影響南海的權力平衡。
briefing.background: 日本與菲律賓的安全合作逐漸加深，主要是因應中國在南海的擴張行為。兩國在歷史上有著複雜的關係，但隨著地緣政治的變化，特別是中國的軍事活動加劇，雙方開始尋求更緊密的合作以維護區域安全。日本作為美國的主要盟友，對於維持南海的航行自由和地區穩定具有重要的戰略意義，而菲律賓則希望透過這種合作來增強自身的防衛能力。
briefing.analysis: 日本與菲律賓的安全夥伴關係可能會引發中國的警覺，並促使其加強在南海的軍事部署。對於日本來說，這樣的合作不僅能提升其在東南亞的影響力，還能在一定程度上平衡中國的擴張。菲律賓則希望透過此夥伴關係獲得更多的安全保障，尤其是在面對中國的領土主張時。然而，這種非正式的合作關係也可能引發其他地區國家的擔憂，進一步複雜化南海的安全局勢。

supporting_titles: China ‘is playing the long game’ in Iran war by staying neutral
China developing first tourist submersible for trips 1,000 metres under the sea

politics.title: US may need to ‘escalate to de-escalate’ Iran war, Bessent says
politics.summary: The United States may need to “escalate” its attacks against Iran to be able to wind down the war, US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said on Sunday, after US President Donald Trump gave seemingly contradictory trajectories for the US military campaign. Trump on Saturday threatened to “obliterate” Iranian energy plants if Tehran did not fully open the pivotal Strait of Hormuz, just a day after saying US objectives were “very close” and that he was considering “winding down” the war. Asked on...

briefing.news_focus: The United States may need to “escalate” its attacks against Iran to be able to wind down the war, US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said on Sunday, after US President Donald Trump gave seemingly contradictory trajectories for the US military campaign. Trump on Saturday threatened to “obliterate” Iranian energy plants if Tehran did not fully open the pivotal Strait of Hormuz, just a day after saying US objectives were “very close” and that he was considering “winding down” the war. Asked on...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國財政部長斯科特·貝森特表示，美國可能需要加大對伊朗的攻擊力度，以便最終結束戰爭。此言論出現在特朗普總統對美軍行動的矛盾表述之後，特朗普威脅若伊朗不開放霍爾木茲海峽，將摧毀其能源設施。
briefing.background: 美國與伊朗的緊張關係已持續多年，尤其是在特朗普政府期間，對伊朗的制裁與軍事行動頻繁。霍爾木茲海峽是全球重要的石油運輸通道，控制該地區對於美國及其盟友至關重要。近期的軍事行動與言論反映出美國在面對伊朗時的策略不斷調整，尤其是在國內外壓力的影響下。
briefing.analysis: 此次貝森特的言論顯示出美國在對伊朗政策上的一種新思路，即透過加大軍事壓力來達成最終的和平解決。這與特朗普的矛盾表述形成鮮明對比，可能導致國內外對美國政策的不確定性加劇。對於伊朗而言，這意味著面臨更大的軍事威脅，而對於美國的盟友，如沙烏地阿拉伯和以色列，則可能感到更有安全保障，但也可能引發更大的地區衝突風險。

economy.title: Gold slides as hawkish Fed and strong US dollar override geopolitical fears
economy.summary: Gold prices have continued to weaken despite escalating tensions in the US-Israel conflict with Iran, breaking from the metal’s traditional role as a geopolitical hedge, as fading expectations of interest rate cuts and a stronger US dollar weigh on sentiment, analysts said. The metal has declined about 15 per cent since a brief surge on March 2, when prices climbed to around US$5,300 per ounce following US and Israeli strikes on Iran. A modest rebound driven by technical buying on Friday did...

briefing.news_focus: Gold prices have continued to weaken despite escalating tensions in the US-Israel conflict with Iran, breaking from the metal’s traditional role as a geopolitical hedge, as fading expectations of interest rate cuts and a stronger US dollar weigh on sentiment, analysts said. The metal has declined about 15 per cent since a brief surge on March 2, when prices climbed to around US$5,300 per ounce following US and Israeli strikes on Iran. A modest rebound driven by technical buying on Friday did...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 儘管美國與以色列與伊朗之間的緊張局勢升級，金價仍持續下滑，顯示出傳統上作為地緣政治避險工具的金屬角色正在減弱。分析指出，市場對於利率減少的期待減退及美元強勢影響了投資者情緒。
briefing.background: 金價通常在地緣政治緊張時期上升，作為避險資產。然而，近期美國聯邦儲備系統（Fed）持續採取鷹派政策，並且美元走強，使得金價反而下滑。自3月2日金價短暫上漲至每盎司5300美元以來，金價已下跌約15%。這一變化反映出市場對於利率政策的重新評估及美元強勢的影響。
briefing.analysis: 此次金價下滑的主要變化在於，市場對於地緣政治風險的反應不再如以往強烈，顯示出投資者對於利率政策的關注度上升。這對於金礦公司及相關投資者可能造成負面影響，因為金價下跌直接影響其盈利能力。同時，強勢美元也可能使其他貨幣持有者對金的需求減少，進一步壓低金價。未來，若Fed持續保持鷹派立場，金價可能會面臨更大壓力。

economy.title: HS2 firm says new steel tariffs will ‘exacerbate’ cost pressures for UK construction industry
economy.summary: Doubling tariffs on imported steel will raise cost of the metal when Iran war is already inflating steel and concrete prices One of HS2’s biggest contractors has warned the government that raising tariffs on foreign steel imports will “exacerbate” cost pressures for the UK construction industry, amid growing concern over the £100bn railway’s rising budget. Ministers said last week they would double the tariffs on imported steel and slash the amount that can be bought from overseas, in an attempt to save Britain’s struggling steelmakers. Continue reading...

Ministers said last week they would double the tariffs on imported steel and slash the amount that can be bought from overseas, in an attempt to save Britain’s struggling steelmakers. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國政府決定將進口鋼材的關稅加倍，這一舉措引發HS2項目主要承包商的警告，稱此舉將加劇英國建築業的成本壓力，尤其是在伊朗戰爭已推高鋼材和混凝土價格的背景下。
briefing.background: 英國政府的這一政策旨在保護本國鋼鐵產業，面對全球鋼材價格上漲及供應鏈問題，特別是在地緣政治緊張的情況下。HS2作為一個耗資巨大的基礎建設項目，其預算已經面臨上升壓力，這使得政府的政策選擇更加複雜。進口關稅的提高可能會導致建築成本進一步上升，影響整體經濟發展。
briefing.analysis: 政府的關稅政策旨在支持本國鋼鐵生產商，但卻可能對建築業造成負面影響。承包商擔心成本上升將導致HS2項目預算進一步膨脹，可能影響到項目的可行性與進度。另一方面，鋼鐵生產商可能會受益於保護措施，但若建築業受到影響，長期來看也可能導致需求下降，形成供需不平衡。各方利益的角力將影響未來政策的走向。

supporting_titles: Who will win from Trump’s tariffs?
New Japanese satellite effort to use light for faster communication

economy.title: ‘The new ketchup’? How hummus spread beyond a niche into a British staple
economy.summary: News that chickpea dip is to join list of products used for UK inflation basket confirms its move into the mainstream The best (and worst) supermarket hummus tasted and rated It is a sign of the times. This week it was revealed that hummus is joining the list of foods used to measure the cost of living in Britain as the ubiquity of the dip at mealtimes sees it billed as the “new ketchup”. The decision to drop a pot of hummus in the inflation basket is a moment for the all-conquering chickpea dip, which arrived on supermarket shelves in the late 1980s. Since then Britons have gone from spending virtually nothing to £170m a year on the versatile stuff. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: News that chickpea dip is to join list of products used for UK inflation basket confirms its move into the mainstream The best (and worst) supermarket hummus tasted and rated It is a sign of the times. This week it was revealed that hummus is joining the list of foods used to measure the cost of living in Britain as the ubiquity of the dip at mealtimes sees it billed as the “new ketchup”. Since then Britons have gone from spending virtually nothing to £170m a year on the versatile stuff. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國的鷹嘴豆泥（hummus）被納入通脹計算籃，標誌著其從小眾食品轉變為主流飲食的里程碑，顯示出其在英國餐桌上的普及程度。
briefing.background: 鷹嘴豆泥自1980年代末進入英國超市以來，逐漸成為受歡迎的食品，消費額從幾乎為零增至每年1.7億英鎊。這一變化反映了消費者飲食習慣的演變，尤其是對健康飲食的重視。隨著素食和植物基飲食的興起，鷹嘴豆泥的需求顯著增加，並成為許多家庭的常見選擇。
briefing.analysis: 此次將鷹嘴豆泥納入通脹計算籃，標誌著其在英國飲食文化中的地位提升，顯示出消費者對健康和多樣化飲食的需求。這一變化不僅影響食品生產商和零售商的市場策略，也可能促使其他類似產品的市場擴張。對於消費者而言，這意味著他們的飲食選擇將更加多元化，而對於政策制定者，則需重新評估食品價格對生活成本的影響。

theme_of_day: 今日新聞整體呈現出科技、政治與經濟之間的緊密聯繫。科技版面中，Nvidia的會議與美國國防部對AI的計畫顯示出人工智慧在軍事及商業領域的潛力，然而投資者的謹慎反映出對市場泡沫的擔憂。而政治版面則聚焦於伊朗戰爭對全球經濟的影響，特別是對非洲及英國建築業的通脹壓力，進一步強調地緣政治事件如何影響經濟決策及市場情緒。
